title: Encountering American Faultlines: Race, Class, and the Dominican Experience in Providence By Jose Itzigsohn Russell Sage Foundation. 2009. 238 pages. $37.50 cloth
abstract: Encountering American Faultlines: Race, Class, and the Dominican Experience in Providence By José Itzigsohn Russell Sage Foundation. 2009. 238 pages. $37.50 cloth Jorge Duany Jorge Duany University of Puerto Rico, Río Piedras Search for other works by this author on: Oxford Academic Google Scholar Social Forces, Volume 89, Issue 3, March 2011, Pages 1071–1073, https://doi.org/10.1093/sf/89.3.1071 Published: 01 March 2011
